an10.146:1.1:
(146) "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the dark path and the bright path
…
… (147) … the good Dhamma and the bad Dhamma … (148) … the Dhamma of a good person and that of a bad person … (149) … the Dhamma to be aroused and the one not to be aroused …
… (150) … the Dhamma to be pursued and the one not to be pursued … (151) … the Dhamma to be developed and the one not to be developed … (152) … the Dhamma to be cultivated and the one not to be cultivated …
(153) … the Dhamma to be recollected and the one not to be recollected … (154) … the Dhamma to be realized and the one not to be realized ….
an10.146:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the Dhamma not to be realized? Wrong view … and wrong liberation. This is called the Dhamma not to be realized.
